inference_notes.budget_after: D2.3 serializes per-row total budget, not event-local before/after budget.
inference_notes.budget_before: D2.3 serializes per-row total budget, not event-local before/after budget.
inference_notes.event_time_key: Derived from D2.3 source step_index; not native LGRC runtime time.
inference_notes.node_proper_time: Derived from event_time_key for involved poles; not native LGRC runtime proper time.
inference_notes.scheduler_event_index: Assigned by ledger event order within the lane.
